turns.content: Help me plan my week. I have a dentist appointment Tuesday, need to finish the API redesign by Thursday, and want to prep for the team retrospective on Friday.

📋 SUMMARY: Weekly planning for Feb 11-15

Here's your week at a glance, Jm:

**Tuesday (Feb 12)**
- Dentist appointment — block travel time before/after
- Start API redesign if not already in progress

**Wednesday (Feb 13)**
- Deep work day — API redesign push
- Aim to have core changes done by EOD to leave Thursday for testing/polish

**Thursday (Feb 14)**
- API redesign deadline — finalize, test, and ship
- Begin retro prep if time allows in the evening

**Friday (Feb 15)**
- Team retrospective — have talking points ready
- Review what went well, what didn't, action items from last sprint

**Suggestions based on your goals:**
- S3/S4 are critical — try to attend at least one community event this week and send an invitation
- S6 (morning stretch) is at 0% — even 5 minutes Tuesday-Friday would break the streak
- Block an alignment hour on 2-3 days around the dentist and deadlines

Want me to put any of this on your calendar or create tasks for these items?

🗣️ Kaya: Week mapped — dentist Tuesday, API done Thursday, retro Friday, plus goal actions.
